methods.description: Process for sampling, pretreating, and measuring charcoal and organic sediments for 14C dating, followed by calibration using specific software and datasets.

steps.description: Charcoal and organic sediments were sampled for 14C dating.
steps.searchable_summary: collect charcoal and organic sediment samples for 14C dating

steps.description: These materials were both pretreated and measured at the Beta Analytic Radiocarbon Laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: pretreat and measure samples at radiocarbon laboratory

steps.description: The 14C dates were calibrated using BetaCal3.21 software and the Northern Hemisphere atmospheric 14C calibration dataset IntCal13.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate 14C dates using BetaCal3.21 and IntCal13 dataset

methods.description: Procedure for collecting, preparing, and measuring OSL samples to estimate the equivalent dose (De) using specific protocols and methods.

steps.description: The OSL samples were collected from freshly cleaned sections using steel tubes.
steps.searchable_summary: collect OSL samples using steel tubes

steps.description: The unexposed central section of each sample was used for OSL measurements to estimate the equivalent dose (De).
steps.searchable_summary: use unexposed central section for OSL measurements

steps.description: The samples were treated with 10% HCl and 30% H2O2 to remove carbonates and organic matter, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: treat samples with HCl and H2O2 to remove impurities

steps.description: Coarse silt fraction (38-63 µm) of these samples was wet sieved and etched with 35% hydrofluorosilicic acid (H2SiF6) for two weeks to remove feldspars.
steps.searchable_summary: wet sieve and etch samples with H2SiF6

steps.description: Finally, 10% HCl was used to remove fluoride precipitates.
steps.searchable_summary: use HCl to remove fluoride precipitates

steps.description: OSL signals were measured using a Risø TL/OSL-DA-20 reader.
steps.searchable_summary: measure OSL signals with Risø TL/OSL-DA-20 reader

steps.description: De was determined using a combination of the single-aliquot regenerative-dose (SAR) protocol and the standardized growth curve (SGC) method.
steps.searchable_summary: determine De using SAR protocol and SGC method

steps.description: Environmental dose rates were calculated based on Prescott and Hutton and the contents of U, Th, and K.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate environmental dose rates using Prescott and Hutton method
